steps: The ratio of orange juice to lemonade is 2:1. This means for every 2 parts orange juice, there is 1 part lemonade. If Sam uses 6 cups of orange juice, we can set up the proportion: 2 parts orange juice corresponds to 6 cups, so 1 part corresponds to 6 ÷ 2 = 3 cups. Therefore, the lemonade needed is 3 cups.
